caption: A group of people wearing blue hairnets, face masks, and pink gloves are gathered around a table covered with napa cabbage and red chili paste, actively preparing kimchi as part of the traditional Korean communal kimchi-making practice known as Kimjang.
A person wearing black gloves holds a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with kimchi, surrounded by a jar of kimchi and a wooden table.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving South Korean flags, standing in front of a brick building with trees in the background.
The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some wearing white hanbok and others in suits, standing in front of the Taegeukgi, the Korean flag.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red hanbok adorned with intricate floral patterns, standing indoors near an open door that reveals a traditional Korean house with wooden beams and a tiled roof.

The image depicts a traditional Korean wedding scene where a couple, dressed in vibrant ceremonial hanboks, kneel before a ritual table adorned with wooden mandarin ducks and candles, symbolizing prosperity and good fortune.

The image shows a traditional Korean ancestral rite setup with a wooden table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, pastries, and grains, arranged on red stands, accompanied by a tea set and calligraphy scrolls in the background.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) where family members are gathered around a ritual table adorned with neatly arranged food offerings, with some individuals performing deep bows as part of the ceremony.
A group of people stands in a line on a paved area, facing a statue and a grassy background, appearing to participate in a solemn ceremony or remembrance.

The image shows a group of men dressed in formal black suits and ties standing solemnly in front of a grave marker, with a small South Korean flag and a plate of food placed on the grass nearby, indicating a Seongmyo ceremony.
The Cheomseongdae observatory is a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, illuminated in pink light, standing in an open field at night.
The Cheomseongdae observatory is a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing in an open field under a clear sky.

The image showcases Gyeongbokgung Palace at night, illuminated against a deep blue sky, featuring traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms.

The image shows Gyeongbokgung Palace, featuring traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and a raised stone platform, set against a backdrop of green hills under a clear blue sky.

The image shows Cheonggyecheon, a restored urban stream in Seoul, featuring a shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and surrounded by trees displaying autumn foliage, with pedestrian walkways visible in the background.
The statue depicts Admiral Yi Sun-shin in Joseon military armor, holding a sword, standing on a pedestal in an urban plaza surrounded by fountains and trees.

Two individuals dressed in black formal attire are performing a deep bow known as "Jeol and Sebae," kneeling on the floor with their hands touching the ground, facing a ceremonial setup adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.

In the image, two individuals dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are seen performing a Jeol and Sebae, kneeling on the floor with their hands touching the ground, demonstrating respect and cultural tradition.

In the image, two individuals dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are engaged in a Jeol and Sebae ritual, with one person kneeling and bowing deeply while the other sits upright, both on a patterned mat.
The image shows a large statue of King Sejong the Great, seated and wearing traditional Joseon robes with a winged crown, positioned on a pedestal with Korean text near its base.

The image shows a large statue of King Sejong the Great, seated and wearing royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, positioned on a pedestal with illuminated Korean text that reads "세종대왕" (Sejongdaewang).
The image shows a person flying a colorful kite with a long tail, which features vibrant rainbow stripes, against a backdrop of a clear sky and a grassy park.
A colorful kite with a rainbow pattern soars high in the sky as a person flies it on a grassy field.
The image shows a group of people seated on the floor around a colorful, floral-patterned Yutnori board, which features a game setup with four wooden sticks (yut) placed at the center.

The image shows two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, sitting on the floor and playing Yutnori, with four wooden sticks (yut) mid-air above them and a game board with circular stations visible on the ground between them.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing Ganggangsullae, a circular dance, in an outdoor setting with a bridge and water in the background.

A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, featuring red and blue colors with white tops, are performing a circular dance on a stage under a full moon, holding hands in a synchronized formation.

The image shows a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a long blue skirt, with an exaggerated painted mask covering their face, standing on a stage with a colorful backdrop and musical instruments in the background.

The image displays a collection of colorful wooden masks with exaggerated facial features, each uniquely painted with vibrant colors and patterns, indicative of traditional Korean masked dance-drama (Talchum).
The image shows a bowl of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, garnished with pieces of shrimp and vegetables, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
The image shows a pot containing Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth, garnished with green onions and corn kernels.
The image shows gimbap, cylindrical rolls of rice and colorful fillings wrapped in dark-green seaweed, sliced into round pieces and topped with sesame seeds.
The image shows a plate of panfried battered meatballs, characterized by small, round, golden-brown patties with an egg-batter coating, arranged neatly on a white paper-lined plate.

The image displays a variety of Hangwa, featuring pastel-colored squares and oblong shapes with pressed floral and geometric patterns, adorned with small decorative pieces such as seeds and dried fruits.

The image displays a box of Hangwa, featuring rectangular pieces in various pastel colors, each adorned with small decorative elements and pressed floral or geometric patterns, arranged neatly in rows.

The image shows a bowl of Yaksik, a Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a dark-brown glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts, served on a checkered cloth atop a green bamboo mat.
The image shows small, square pieces of Yakgwa, a Korean honey cookie, with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze and garnished with small white flowers and green leaves.
The image shows a dish that appears to be Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced pieces of beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served in a large pan with vegetables and broth.

The image shows a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with chopped green onions, shredded carrots, and a sprinkle of seaweed.

The image shows a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.

The image shows a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown glass noodles mixed with vibrant julienned vegetables such as carrots and green peppers, garnished with sesame seeds, creating a glossy sheen.
The image shows a traditional Korean building with a curved tiled roof and colorful decorative elements, situated atop a stone wall, indicative of the architectural style of Namhansanseong fortress.

The image shows a traditional Korean Haenggung, featuring wooden buildings with curved black-tiled roofs and colorful dancheong-painted eaves, arranged around open courtyards surrounded by stone walls and lush greenery.
The Paldalmun Gate features an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls adorned with red flags and traditional Korean architectural details.
The EXPO Hanbit Tower is a tall white observation tower with a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, prominently situated against a backdrop of green hills under an overcast sky.
This image depicts a group of soldiers in military uniforms and vehicles in a rural setting, likely from the Korean War era, as suggested by their attire and equipment.

The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, suggesting significant destruction and abandonment, which aligns with the aftermath of conflict during The Korean War.

This image depicts a rural village scene with traditional thatched-roof houses and people gathered near a stone wall, set against a backdrop of rolling hills and trees, but does not include any direct visual elements characteristic of "The Korean War."
The image shows a colorful, multi-colored shuttlecock being kicked into the air during a game of Jegichagi.
The image shows a child dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest and gray pants, kicking a small blue shuttlecock (jegi) into the air with their foot.
